WorkoutDescription:
POST-RACE RECOVERY
No running. Walk 20-30min. Foam roll gently. Compression. Eat well — protein 1.8g/kg, carbs high.
Sleep 9h+. Celebrate the 77K — it was the perfect dress rehearsal.

Easy walk 30min flat.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
Full rest. Gentle stretching 10min in evening. Monitor resting HR — should trend back to baseline by Sunday.

EASY SWIM 30min. Pull buoy ok. No flip-turn sprints. Pure circulation work.
Evening: foam roll quads + calves 10min.

Walk 45min, light hills ok.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
EASY SPIN 1h flat, high cadence 90+, HR strictly Z1 (<138). No intensity. Café stop encouraged.

Rest. Review Gypaète data: what worked (nutrition, pacing — avg HR 122 was perfect) and what to improve (late-race descents, HR drifted to 170+).
That descent resistance is THE focus of this block.
Full rest.

FIRST RUN BACK — 30min flat, HR strictly <138. Walk breaks if HR drifts. Soft surface if possible.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
Easy swim 40min. Evening: 15min core (plank circuit x3).
Easy run 40min flat. HR <138. Check legs: any sharp pain = stop, walk home.
Full rest. Book travel/logistics for Nice (race Sept 26, start Roubion 109K/5,400m D+).
Easy run 50min rolling terrain. Mostly Z1, Z2 caps on small rises. Enjoy — no watch-staring.
Easy hike 1h30 with poles, 400-500m D+. Conversational. Re-groove pole rhythm without running load.

AM — EASY RUN (fasted) 45min flat, HR <138. Black coffee only before.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 3x6 (reintro week — lighter) @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

Easy run 45min Z1-Z2, finish with 6x20s relaxed strides (not sprints), walk-back recovery.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM — easy run 45min flat, fasted.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose

SALÈVE PARTIAL — 1h45. Hike climb with poles at 400 m/h, HR Z2. Controlled easy descent — short quick steps, no braking.
This is the vert reintroduction: stop at 600m D+ even if feeling great.
Full rest.
LONG RUN 2h rolling trail. Z2 throughout. Practice eating: 60g carbs/h to keep gut trained.
Recovery jog 40min flat or full rest if legs heavy.

AM — EASY RUN (fasted) 50min flat, HR <138.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — HILL REPEATS
10min warm-up Z1. Main set: 6x4min on 10-15% grade at Z3 (153-168). Walk/jog down, HR <140 before next rep. 10min cool-down.
Short steps, upright posture, active arms.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM — easy run 45min flat, fasted.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose

SALÈVE CLIMB 2h15. Ascent ~1h30 with poles, 400-450 m/h, Z2. Descent 45min controlled, quick steps.
Gym alternative: step runner 60-75min Z2, no handrails.
Full rest. Prep weekend route + nutrition.
LONG RUN 2h30. Z2. Nutrition: 70g carbs/h. Last 30min: focus on running ALL runnable gradients (<8%) even when tired.
Recovery jog 45min Z1 or rest.

AM — EASY RUN (fasted) 50min flat, HR <138.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — HILL REPEATS
10min warm-up Z1. Main set: 7x4min on 10-15% grade at Z3 (153-168). Walk/jog down, HR <140 before next rep. 10min cool-down.
Short steps, upright posture, active arms.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM — easy run 45min flat, fasted.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose
SALÈVE 2h30. Climb Z2 with poles 450 m/h. DESCENT: run it at moderate-firm effort, cadence 85+, rehearse late-race leg fatigue management.
Full rest. Prep weekend route + nutrition.
LONG RUN 3h mountain. Z2 strict, walk all climbs with poles, run everything runnable. 80g carbs/h — full race-style fueling.
Easy trail jog 1h Z1.

AM — EASY RUN (fasted) 50min flat, HR <138.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — DOWNHILL REPEATS (the Gypaète lesson: HR hit 170+ in final descents)
15min warm-up climb easy with poles. Main set: 6x3min hard-but-controlled downhill efforts on moderate technical trail (~-10%), focus on quick cadence 85+, soft knees, eyes 3m ahead. Hike back up easy between reps. 10min cool-down.
Builds eccentric resistance so quads survive km 90-109 to the Promenade des Anglais.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM — easy run 45min flat, fasted.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose
SALÈVE 2h30. Same as W5 but climb target 450-475 m/h, still Z2. If HR exceeds 153, slow down — discipline now = 17h in September.
Full rest. Prep weekend route + nutrition.

LONG RUN 4h — biggest since Gypaète. Z2 cap. 80-90g carbs/h, salt cap every 45min, 500-700ml water/h.
Pick terrain similar to Mercantour: long climbs, sustained descents.
Easy jog 1h Z1. Legs will be heavy — that is the point (training on fatigue).
Full rest.

Easy run 45min.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

Easy 45min + 6x20s strides.

LUNCH — light STRENGTH A (60% loads, no finisher).
Easy run 45min Z1.
Full rest.
Moderate long run 2h Z2. Comfortable — absorb the Build 1 block.
Recovery jog or rest. Mid-plan check: resting HR, weight, motivation, shoes mileage (order race shoes NOW if needed).

AM — EASY RUN (fasted) 50min flat, HR <138.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — TEMPO CLIMB
15min warm-up. Main: 30min continuous climb at high Z2/low Z3 (148-158) with poles — race-effort calibration. Easy descent. 10min cool-down.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM — easy run 45min flat, fasted.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose
SALÈVE 2h45 — climb, descend halfway, re-climb (1,000m D+ total). Teaches re-climbing on tired legs: Nice has 4 major cols.
Full rest. Prep weekend route + nutrition.
LONG RUN 4h30. Z2. Full race fueling 90g carbs/h. Practice aid-station discipline: stop max 5min at your refuel points, NEVER sit.
Easy trail jog 1h15.

AM — EASY RUN (fasted) 50min flat, HR <138.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — DOWNHILL REPEATS (the Gypaète lesson: HR hit 170+ in final descents)
15min warm-up climb easy with poles. Main set: 8x3min hard-but-controlled downhill efforts on moderate technical trail (~-10%), focus on quick cadence 85+, soft knees, eyes 3m ahead. Hike back up easy between reps. 10min cool-down.
Builds eccentric resistance so quads survive km 90-109 to the Promenade des Anglais.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM — easy run 45min flat, fasted.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose

SALÈVE+ 3h. Climb 450-475 m/h Z2, extend along ridge, long sustained descent at firm effort.
Poles ALWAYS — they save 5-8% leg energy you will need at km 90.
Full rest. Prep weekend route + nutrition.

LONG RUN 5h. First 3h strictly Z1-Z2, last 2h at target race effort. 90g carbs/h, caffeine 100mg at h3.
Wear full race kit: vest, poles, shoes, flasks. Test everything.
Easy jog 1h15 Z1. Eat big — recovery week-end choc coming W10.

AM — easy run 45min fasted.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

AM — HILL REPEATS
10min warm-up Z1. Main set: 7x4min on 10-15% grade at Z3 (153-168). Walk/jog down, HR <140 before next rep. 10min cool-down.
Short steps, upright posture, active arms.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

Easy 40min.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose
Full rest. Carb-load lite for the back-to-back weekend. Prep both routes + all nutrition.
Shakeout 30min Z1.

WEEK-END CHOC DAY 1 — 5h30, 42km / 2,600m D+.
Z2 ceiling all day. Walk all climbs with poles 450 m/h. Run all descents at controlled-firm effort.
Fueling: 90g carbs/h, salt every 45min, 500-700ml/h. This is race rehearsal #1.

WEEK-END CHOC DAY 2 — 2h30 on destroyed legs. THIS is where the 17h is built: teaches body to move efficiently in glycogen-depleted, muscle-damaged state = km 80-109 at Nice.
Z1-Z2 only. Keep fueling 60-70g/h.
Full rest. Body battery refill.

Easy 40min.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.

Easy swim or spin 45min.

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.

Easy 45min + strides.

Light STRENGTH A (60% loads).

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.
Full rest.

Moderate long 2h30 Z2. Midday heat if possible (Nice will be warm even in late Sept).

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.
Easy jog or rest.

AM — easy 50min fasted.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (50min)
Ultra Goal: eccentric protection for 5,400m of descent + climbing power.
WARM-UP (5min): leg swings, glute bridges, bodyweight squats, ankle circles.
A1. Back Squat eccentric — 4x6 @60% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8/leg — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm) — 3x10/leg | B2. Romanian Deadlift DB — 3x8
C1. Explosive Step-ups — 3x6/leg | C2. Calf Raises — 2x15
CORE x2: Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10/side | Pallof Press 10/side
FINISHER 8min EMOM: even = 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | odd = 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.

AM — 15min warm-up, 35min continuous climb at race effort (148-158) with poles, easy descent, cool-down.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

Easy 40min.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (40min)
Pole-specific upper body + conditioning.
CIRCUIT A x4 (40s/20s): Lat Pulldown | Push-ups | DB Shoulder Press | Bent-over Rows — 60s rest between rounds
CIRCUIT B x3 (40s/20s): Russian Twists | Box Step-ups | Mountain Climbers | KB Swings 16kg
COOL-DOWN 5min: thoracic opener, lat + pec stretch, child's pose

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.
Full rest. Prep THE dress rehearsal: exact race kit, exact nutrition, drop bag plan, pacing card.
Shakeout 30min.

RACE SIMULATION — 6h30, ~50km / 3,000m D+. Last monster session, 4 weeks out.
Start at race time (~5am) with headlamp. Full kit. Exact race nutrition: 90g carbs/h, C90 hourly, bar every 2h, salt every 45min, caffeine at h3 then every 3h.
PACING (= Nice plan): climbs 450-500 m/h Z2 with poles | flats 6:30-7:00/km | descents controlled-firm, cadence 85+.
Walk ALL climbs. NEVER exceed Z3. If avg HR >130 at halfway, slow down.
Easy hike 2h with poles on tired legs. Slow, conversational. Cap the biggest weekend of the plan (~8h30 / 3,500m D+).
Full rest after simulation weekend.

Easy 45min.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.

AM — easy 50min fasted.

LUNCH — STRENGTH A at 80% loads, last heavy session of the plan.

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.
SALÈVE 2h30 — final full climb. Race effort Z2, poles. Firm descent, perfect technique.
Full rest.
LONG RUN 3h30 Z2. Last 45min at race effort. Full fueling rehearsal one more time. After this: the hay is in the barn.
Easy jog 45min or rest.

Easy 40min fasted.

LUNCH — STRENGTH maintenance: 2x8 squats 50%, 2x8/leg step-ups, core circuit x2. NO eccentric overload from now on.

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.

Hill repeats 5x3min Z3 — keep the legs sharp, reduced volume.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min

Full rest.

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.
Medium mountain run 1h45 Z2 with poles. Smooth and easy.
Full rest. Finalize logistics: bibs pickup times, drop bags, crew/no-crew plan, bus to Roubion.
Last 2h+ run. Z2, include 30min at race effort. Confidence builder — notice how easy race pace feels now.
Easy jog or rest.

Easy 40min.

Core circuit x2 only — no weights this week.

HEAT PROTOCOL (post-session): 20-25min sauna OR overdressed easy spin.
Goal: plasma volume adaptation for the hot Nice hinterland in September. 3-4x/week from Week 11.
Last heat sessions Mon-Wed, then stop.

Easy 40min + 5x20s strides.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
Full rest. Start sleep banking: 8h30+ every night this week.
Medium run 1h15 with 20min at race effort on a climb, poles. Last meaningful session.
Full rest. Pack drop bags. Check mandatory kit list against UTMB rules (headlamps x2, blanket, phone, cup, reserves).
Relaxed 1h15 trail. Enjoy. Visualize the race: Roubion start, 4 cols, the sea appearing, Promenade des Anglais.
Full rest. Carb intake starts trending up from today (+20%).
Easy 30min Z1. Hydrate well all week. Carbs 8-10g/kg/day from Wednesday.
Easy 25min + 4 short strides. Legs should feel bouncy.
Travel day. Compression socks for the drive/flight. Walk 20min on arrival. Hydrate.
Shakeout 20min along the Promenade. Bib pickup. Early dinner, no experiments.

Rest. Feet up. Final kit check, flasks filled, pacing card in vest:
SECTION TARGETS (17h): be patient to km 30 — bank NOTHING, the race starts at km 70.
Early dinner. Sleep by 20h30 if early bus to Roubion.

Details: 109km / 5,400m D+ — Nice Côte d'Azur by UTMB — 17H GOAL
WorkoutDescription:
*** RACE DAY — NICE 100K — 26 SEPT 2026 ***
Distance: 109km | D+: 5,400m | Goal: 17 hours (≈6:15/effort-km)

PACING (Gypaète-proven — you ran 5:55/ekm there at avg HR 122, you have margin):
Climbs: 450-500 m/h, poles, Z2 max | Flats: 6:30-7:00/km Z1-Z2 | Descents: controlled, cadence 85+, save quads to km 109
First 30km (high Mercantour): deliberately SLOW — Z1-Z2 only, you should feel embarrassed by how easy it is.
Km 30-70: steady Z2 rhythm, aid stations <5min, NEVER sit.
Km 70-109: race starts here. Descents to the sea = where 17h is won. Trust the downhill repeats.

NUTRITION (validated at Gypaète): 80-90g carbs/h | C90 hourly | bar every 2h | salt cap every 45min | 500-700ml water/h, more in afternoon heat | caffeine 100mg at h3, then every 3h.

HEAT: afternoon coastal sections will be warm — ice/water on neck at every aid station from km 60.
NIGHT START: headlamp until ~7h30, manage it at first aid station.

Walk ALL climbs. NEVER exceed Z3. The Promenade is waiting.

POST-RACE
No running 7-10 days. Walk, swim, eat, sleep, celebrate on the Promenade.
Days 1-7: no running | Days 8-14: easy jogs 3x/week | Week 3+: normal running.
